g.text: struct fuse_file_info | Total Size: 40 bytes | Alignment: 8B
Inode Metadata Structure | Total Size: 128 bytes (2x Cache Lines)

div.p: By storing the Inode Number in fi->fh during fs_open, we bypass the O(depth) cost of path_resolve for every read() and write() call.
VFS Path Resolve Cost: Multiple directory block reads + string comparisons. Latency: O(N).
FUSE File Handle Cost: Direct index into kernel Inode table. Bypass dcache. Latency: O(1).
